creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 244512
screenshot: 'freebsd_committer - FreeBSD Committer'

Follow-up to merge bug 264503 (2022-06-06) and <https://cgit.freebsd.org/doc/commit/?id=3cf16c8526c8cd78418b956f4cec78aeed63af9f> (2023-08-24):

* please merge this account (reporting) with my non-committing account. 

No rush. 

Thanks, and in the meantime: 

a) I'm attending to around fifteen reports for which I'm currently the 
   assignee, most of which are for ports (doing so now, to avoid 
   multiple reassignments where there's a named maintainer with an 
   ID @freebsd.org (bug 250208 is, sadly, amongst the exceptions))

b) I have expanded my name to 'Graham Perrin (FreeBSD Project alumnus, 
   non-committing) for people to not misunderstand the 'FreeBSD Committer'
   label that appears when pointing at the FreeBSD icon for this account.
